title: getRepeat()
text: getRepeat() Get the repeat count from the UTIMER component. Explain this code operation getRepeat params numeric Count : OUT endparams Copy Parameters Count —integer that indicates how many times the current instance of the UTIMER component sends its message. A Count of 0 indicates unlimited repetition. Return Values The value returned in $status is always 0 . Use Allowed in all Uniface component types. Description The getRepeat() operation gets the repeat count for the current instance of the UTIMER component. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
